/Users/c0d3_cru5h/.nix-profile/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/3Rats.dir/main.cpp.o -o 3Rats   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib lib3RatsLib.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.0/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.22.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.3/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib
